TopModule.BindInstances: context_group_U residual_U projected_U faddfsub_32ns_32ns_32_7_full_dsp_1_U843 sub_ln494_fu_275_p2 fadd_32ns_32ns_32_7_full_dsp_1_U859 fadd_32ns_32ns_32_7_full_dsp_1_U860 add_ln504_fu_338_p2 add_ln505_fu_343_p2

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
attn_o_w_all_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of attn_o_w_all,
attn_o_w_all_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of attn_o_w_all,
attn_o_b_all_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of attn_o_b_all,
attn_o_b_all_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of attn_o_b_all,
attn_norm_gamma_all_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of attn_norm_gamma_all,
attn_norm_gamma_all_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of attn_norm_gamma_all,
attn_norm_beta_all_1, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of attn_norm_beta_all,
attn_norm_beta_all_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of attn_norm_beta_all,

table.keys: Interface, Register Mode, TDATA, TREADY, TVALID
Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: s_axi_control, register, offset, name=attn_o_w_all_1 offset=0x10 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=attn_o_w_all_2 offset=0x14 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=attn_o_b_all_1 offset=0x1c range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=attn_o_b_all_2 offset=0x20 range=32

s_axi_control, register, offset, name=attn_norm_gamma_all_2 offset=0x2c range=32

s_axi_control, register, offset, name=attn_norm_beta_all_2 offset=0x38 range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Loop, Direction, Length, Width, Location
HW Interface, Variable, Loop, Problem, Resolution, Location
table.column: bias, LOAD_OUT_BIAS_PACK, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0, 214-353, /home/minhphat/split_kernel/kernels/bert_attn_out_norm_residual_kernel.cpp:57:5

gamma, LOAD_NORM_PACK, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0, 214-353, /home/minhphat/split_kernel/kernels/bert_attn_out_norm_residual_kernel.cpp:195:5

beta, LOAD_NORM_PACK, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0, 214-353, /home/minhphat/split_kernel/kernels/bert_attn_out_norm_residual_kernel.cpp:195:5

weight, LOAD_OUT_WEIGHT, Could not widen since type i512 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0, 214-353, /home/minhphat/split_kernel/kernels/bert_attn_out_norm_residual_kernel.cpp:116:13
, , Could not burst due to multiple potential reads to the same bundle in the same region., 214-224, /home/minhphat/split_kernel/kernels/bert_attn_out_norm_residual_kernel.cpp:195:5
